name: budget_view
description: Get the current budget summary including income, expenses, balances, accounts, and loans.
description_for_agent: Get budget summary for a given month. Shows total income, expenses, balance, min daily earnings needed, breakdown by category, accounts and loans. Use when user asks about their budget, finances, balance, or spending. Optional parameter: month_key (YYYY-MM format, defaults to current month).

month_key.description: Month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to current month if not provided.
